case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS POWELL, STEPHEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,074.80 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT POWELL, STEPHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-15-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
